scenes.narration: Lab 2, in the same Codespace. The image you pushed in Lab 1 will run on your kind cluster: replicated, load balanced, self healing, and health probed.
Apply the Deployment: three replicas of your Lab 1 image, each probed on slash health z. Watch the node column: pods spread across control plane and worker automatically.
Expose a Service. On Codespaces the NodePort lives on the kind node container I P, not localhost. Capture node I P and port into one URL variable — use that for every curl from here on.

Eight requests to one address: served by changes every time — that is load balancing. Delete a pod: a replacement appears immediately. Scale to five, then back to three. Keep this codespace open for Lab 3.
Recap: the same image, now replicated across two nodes, load balanced through served by, self healing on failure, and scaled with one command.
